title: Chondrocyte Isolation from Human Cartilage
author: Sarah Snelling
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8uphwvn

steps.title: Make up Collagenase solution (1mg/ml) in...
steps.instruction: Make up Collagenase solution (1mg/ml) in standard medium, allow to dissolve and sterile filter through a 0.45um followed by 0.2um syringe filter. The 0.45um filter step is essential to enable efficient filtration. Collagenase mixture can be used fresh or immediately frozen and used up to 6 months after preparation. Store in aliquots as there is loss of activity with freeze-thaw cycles.

steps.title: Wash cartilage-bone cut thoroughly in PBS...
steps.instruction: Wash cartilage-bone cut thoroughly in PBS by shaking for 1 minute.

steps.title: Place cartilage-bone cut on a sterile...
steps.instruction: Place cartilage-bone cut on a sterile cutting board and use a clean scalpel to scrape off any remaining blood or non-cartilage tissue from the cartilage surface

steps.title: Cutting flat along the bone, remove...
steps.instruction: Cutting flat along the bone, remove full thickness pieces of cartilage from the bone surface and place in standard medium in a petri dish

steps.title: Cut cartilage pieces (in media) in...
steps.instruction: Cut cartilage pieces (in media) in to approx 3mmx3mmxfull thickness pieces using a scalpel.

steps.title: Place cartilage pieces in to collagenase...
steps.instruction: Place cartilage pieces in to collagenase digestion mix (10% v/v cartilage:digestion mix) in a 50ml tube

steps.title: Incubate cartilage-collagenase mix for 12-15 hours...
steps.instruction: Incubate cartilage-collagenase mix for 12-15 hours at 37C with shaking (45-60rpm).

steps.title: After digestion, pass mixture through a 70um cell sieve
steps.instruction: After digestion, pass mixture through a 70um cell sieve

steps.title: Centrifuge filtered solution for 5 minutes at 300xg
steps.instruction: Centrifuge filtered solution for 5 minutes at 300xg

steps.title: Wash pellet, resuspend and repeat centrifugation step
steps.instruction: Wash pellet, resuspend and repeat centrifugation step

steps.title: Resuspend cells in 1ml standard medium...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in 1ml standard medium until pellet is completely resuspended. Take volume up to 10ml and mix thoroughly by pipetting.

steps.title: Count cells and adjust volume to...
steps.instruction: Count cells and adjust volume to 4x10 4 cells/ml in standard medium

steps.title: Plate 10ml cell:media mixture into relevant...
steps.instruction: Plate 10ml cell:media mixture into relevant number of 10cm cell-culture treated petri dishes and leave for 3-7 days to adhere at 37C in a CO 2 incubator

steps.title: Once cells have adhered (this can...
steps.instruction: Once cells have adhered (this can take 3-7 days) refresh media and continue to refresh media every 2-3 days until cells reach 80% confluence.

steps.title: Freeze
steps.instruction: Freeze: By washing cells in standard medium, scraping in approx 5ml per plate, and centrifuging in 15ml tubes before resuspending in ice cold 10%DMSO in FBS prior to immediate freezing.

steps.title: OR: Passage cells by washing cells...
steps.instruction: OR: Passage cells by washing cells in standard medium, scraping in approx 5ml per plate, and centrifuging in 15ml tubes before resuspending in appropriate volume of medium for a 1:2 split (ie each 10cm dish becomes 2x10cm dishes). Cells should ideally be used at this passage.
